name: Netlify DB
description: Add a guestbook demo powered by Netlify DB (Postgres) with Drizzle ORM. Demonstrates full CRUD with a serverless database.

packageFileDescriptions.DB-SETUP.md: Setup guide: link to Netlify, run netlify db init, configure DATABASE_URL.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/db-example.tsx: Guestbook route (/db-example): form to add entries, list from getEntries/addEntry.
packageFileDescriptions.src/server/guestbook.functions.ts: Server functions: getEntries (list), addEntry (create) for guestbook via Drizzle.
packageFileDescriptions.src/db/index.ts: Drizzle + Neon client; exports db and schema.
packageFileDescriptions.src/db/schema.ts: Guestbook table schema: id, name, message, createdAt.
packageFileDescriptions.drizzle.config.ts: Drizzle Kit config for migrations; postgres, schema path, DATABASE_URL.
